Bus Timings

Bus C19 Timetable Deira City Center to Al Qusais

March 9, 2026
By Al Khaleej
Install
★★★★★ 5.0
Google Play Official App
UAE Bus Timing

Travel across the UAE with confidence. No confusion. No wasted time.

Dubai’s dynamic infrastructure system includes an efficient and reliable system of public transportation, including metro, tram, bus and ferry, which serve the residents and visitors of the city. Bus C19 is one of the important routes of the extensive network which connects Deira City Center to Al Qusais. It is a vital commuter link between commercial centers, residential areas and major institutions.

Written in this article, we will get to know more about Bus C19 in details from its working schedule, route overview, and some useful tips for its ride specification.

New Route C26 Replaces C19 Bus Route

This C19 bus route has been still in old and unused form. Station DNATA 2 on this new line is a bus stop that is located alongside Deira City Centre.

Contents

Operational Details

Bus C19 runs all day, and is a dependable service. Below is the schedule for departures from Deira City Center and Al Qusais Industrial Area Terminus:

From Deira City Center Bus Station From Al Qusais Industrial Area Terminus
05:29 06:00
05:49 06:20
06:09 06:40
06:24 06:55
06:39 07:14
06:54 07:31
07:09 07:49
07:24 08:04
07:39 08:19
07:54 08:34
08:09 08:48
08:25 09:04
08:40 09:20
08:52 09:32
09:06 09:46
09:17 09:57
09:33 10:12
09:48 10:28
10:06 10:47
10:16 10:57
10:30 11:13
10:49 11:32
11:09 11:53
11:33 12:17
11:56 12:40
12:17 13:01
12:37 13:21
12:57 13:41
13:17 14:01
13:37 14:21
13:57 14:41
14:17 15:01
14:37 15:21
14:57 15:45
15:15 16:04
15:33 16:22
15:54 16:50
16:13 17:13
16:34 17:37
16:49 17:49
17:04 18:09
17:18 18:31
17:34 18:51
17:49 19:06
18:04 19:21
18:19 19:37
18:31 19:46
18:47 20:01
19:02 20:08
19:17 20:17
19:32 20:28
19:45 20:37
19:58 20:46
20:12 20:59
20:25 21:08
20:41 21:19
20:59 21:31
21:29 22:00
22:29 22:30

Bus C19 TimetableThe full schedule can be found on RTA’s official website or on the dedicated Bus C19 Timings page.

Ticket Pricing: The Nol Card is Dubai’s unified public transportation payment system and makes traveling on Bus C19 easy and convenient. A single trip to one zone starts at AED 3 as the base fare. Topping up the Nol Card is easy and convenient as the ticket can be topped up at metro stations, online platforms, or through kiosks around the city.

Route Overview

The Bus C19 route is an easy way to travel between Deira and Al Qusais and serves a number of important residential, commercial and service locations. The route includes the following notable stops:

  1. Deira City Center Bus Station A major commercial and transportation hub in Deira.

  2. City Centre Metro Bus Stop A2 Located near the City Centre Deira Metro Station for easy transfers.

  3. DNATA The headquarters of the Dubai National Air Transport Association.

  4. Ministry of Environment A significant government office overseeing environmental regulations.

  5. Al Bakhit Center A local shopping and service center offering a variety of amenities.

  6. Hamarain Center A popular retail destination in the heart of Deira.

  7. Abu Baker Al Siddique Metro Bus Stop 1 Close to the Abu Baker Al Siddique Metro Station, offering easy connections.

  8. Dubai Scout Mission A community hub for Dubai Scouts, hosting various events.

  9. Al Jadeed Bakery A famous bakery known for its local specialties.

Recommended Guides

Enhance your daily commute with these essential transport guides:

Complete RTA Intercity Routes Guide Largest Bus Stations Infrastructure in UAE

  1. Ahli Club A sports and social club serving the local community with recreational activities.

  2. Stadium Metro Bus Stop A stop near Dubai’s prominent sports stadiums.

  3. Twar, Union Cooperative Society A bustling retail hub offering a wide range of products.

  4. Al Khulafa’a Al Rashideen Boys School A well-regarded educational institution.

14.

  1. Damascus Road 1 The first of several stops along the key Damascus Road thoroughfare.

  2. Damascus Road 2 A second stop on Damascus Road, connecting residents and businesses.

  3. Damascus Road 3 Another stop along the important Damascus Road.

  4. Damascus Road 4 The final stop on this key part of the route.

  5. Al Qusais Industrial Area Etisalat Located in a key industrial zone with major facilities.

  6. Al Qusais Industrial Area Terminus The final stop, serving the Al Qusais Industrial Area.

Attractions and Landmarks Nearby

Bus C19 travels past several landmarks and attractions, making it a convenient mode of transportation for visitors and residents:

  1. Deira City Center A large shopping mall with retail stores, restaurants, and entertainment options.

2.

  1. Union Cooperative Society A key location for shopping and community services.

4.

Journey Experience

A long trip but nevertheless, an interesting journey on a Bus C19 from Deira City Center to Al Qusais takes you through some of Dubai’s most dynamic areas.

The contrast between modern development and older, traditional buildings as it moves through the Al Qusais Industrial Area gives a unique look at Dubai’s rapid growth. The route also takes passengers past Dubai’s hotspots including the Union Cooperative Society in Al Twar and the Damascus Road area. This RTA bus route is not only the one that takes you close to places like Hamarain Center and Ahli Club, but it also gives you the opportunity to see the commercial as well as the residential side of Dubai.

Official UAE Sources

For the latest schedules, fares, and policy updates, verify with these primary sources:

  • RTA Journey Planner
  • RTA Intercity Timetable Reference (E100)
  • Abu Dhabi Mobility
  • Sharjah Roads and Transport Authority (SRTA)

Editorial review date: March 9, 2026.

Written by Al Khaleej
